name: Seven-Point Story Structure
author: Dan Wells
description: 7-point system focusing on internal and external arcs.
avoid_if: You want very granular beat-by-beat guidance.

steps.name: Hook
steps.prompt: The hero in their normal world, demonstrating their flaw.

steps.name: Plot Turn 1
steps.prompt: The inciting incident that pushes the hero into a new world.

steps.name: Pinch Point 1
steps.prompt: Pressure from the antagonist/problem; the stakes rise.

steps.name: Midpoint
steps.prompt: The hero moves from reaction to action.

steps.name: Pinch Point 2
steps.prompt: A major blow from the antagonist; things look their worst.

steps.name: Plot Turn 2
steps.prompt: The hero discovers the key to solving the main problem.

steps.name: Resolution
steps.prompt: The climax and the aftermath; how the hero has changed.
